judgment.summary: High-growth software company with strong margins and free cash flow, trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter was in line with estimates; next earnings date is 2026-07-22.
positives: Revenue growth 22.1% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Operating margin 13.3% and Profit margin 12.6% — healthy profitability.
Free cash flow $5.11B TTM — robust cash generation.
Forward P/E 20.55x and PEG ratio 1.00x — growth is priced in but reasonable.
Consensus 'strong buy' from 44 analysts with a high mean target.
negatives: Trailing P/E 60.76x — valuation is high on trailing earnings.
Earnings growth 2.3% YoY — lagging revenue growth.
Current ratio 0.84 and Quick ratio 0.69 — liquidity is tight.
Debt/Equity 20.73% — leverage is present but manageable given cash flow.

news.paragraph: ServiceNow's recent headlines are sparse, offering little immediate direction for traders. The company's next earnings date is set for July 22nd, which may serve as a catalyst. Until then, price action will likely be driven by broader market trends and analyst sentiment.
